title: Locked Account — Password Reset Request

servicenow_seed.short_description: [TRAINING] User account locked after multiple failed login attempts
servicenow_seed.description: A user is unable to log into Windows. They have attempted to log in 5 times and their account is now locked. They need access restored urgently as they have a meeting in 30 minutes.

correct_steps: Validate caller identity via employee ID or manager confirmation
Unlock the account in Active Directory Users and Computers
Reset the password and force change at next login
Confirm user can successfully log in
Document actions taken in the work note
rationale: Account lockouts are a Tier 1 task handled by the Service Desk. Caller validation is mandatory before any account changes per security policy.
